016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
027
028/**
029 * Represents a simple namespace mapping between a simple name and URI.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * In general, the simple name will be used as the XML prefix mapping unless there are conflicts or prefix re-mappings
033 * in the serializer.
034 *
035 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
036 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/XmlBasics">XML Basics</a>
037 * </ul>
038 */
039@SuppressWarnings({
040   "java:S3740" // Raw Comparable type used intentionally for namespace ordering where the generic bound cannot be expressed
041})
042@Marshalled
043public class Namespace {
044
045   private static final ConcurrentHashMap<String,Namespace> CACHE = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
046
047   /**
048    * Converts the specified object into a {@link Namespace} object.
049    *
050    * <p>
051    * Can be any of following types:
052    * <ul>
053    *    <li>A {@link Namespace} object
054    *    <li>A string containing a name/value pair of the form <js>"name:uri"</js>.
055    * </ul>
056    *
057    * @param o The input.
058    * @return The namespace object, or <jk>null</jk> if the input was <jk>null</jk> or an empty JSON object.
059    */
060   public static Namespace create(Object o) {
061      if (o == null)
062         return null;
063      if (o instanceof Namespace o2)
064         return o2;
065      if (o instanceof CharSequence o3)
066         return of(o3.toString());
067      throw rex("Invalid object type passed to Namespace.create(Object):  ''{0}''", cn(o));
068   }
069
070   /**
071    * Converts the specified object into an array of {@link Namespace} object.
072    *
073    * <p>
074    * Can be any of following types:
075    * <ul>
076    *    <li>A {@link Namespace} array
077    *    <li>A comma-delimited string with key/value pairs of the form <js>"name:uri"</js>.
078    *    <li>A <c>Collection</c> containing any of object that can be passed to {@link #createArray(Object)}.
079    * </ul>
080    *
081    * @param o The input.
082    * @return The namespace objects, or <jk>null</jk> if the input was <jk>null</jk> or an empty JSON object.
083    */
084   public static Namespace[] createArray(Object o) {
085
086      if (o instanceof Namespace[] o2)
087         return o2;
088
089      if (o instanceof String[] o2) {
090         var n = new Namespace[o2.length];
091         for (var i = 0; i < o2.length; i++)
092            n[i] = create(o2[i]);
093         return n;
094      }
095
096      if (o instanceof CharSequence o2) {
097         var ss = splita(o2.toString());
098         var n = new Namespace[ss.length];
099         for (var i = 0; i < ss.length; i++)
100            n[i] = create(ss[i]);
101         return n;
102      }
103
104      if (o instanceof Collection o2) {
105         var n = new Namespace[o2.size()];
106         var i = 0;
107         for (var o3 : o2) {
108            if (o3 instanceof Namespace o4)
109               n[i++] = o4;
110            else if (o3 instanceof CharSequence o4)
111               n[i++] = create(o4.toString());
112            else
113               throw rex("Invalid type passed to NamespaceFactory.createArray: ''{0}''", cn(o));
114         }
115         return n;
116      }
117
118      throw rex("Invalid type passed to NamespaceFactory.createArray: ''{0}''", cn(o));
119   }
120
121   /**
122    * Create a {@link Namespace} from a <js>"name:uri"</js> string pair.
123    *
124    * @param key The key/pair string.
125    * @return The namespace object.
126    */
127   public static Namespace of(String key) {
128      var n = CACHE.get(key);
129      if (nn(n))
130         return n;
131      var i = key.indexOf(':');
132      if (i == -1)
133         return of(key, null);
134      if (key.startsWith("http://") || key.startsWith("https://"))
135         return of(null, key);
136      return of(key.substring(0, i).trim(), key.substring(i + 1).trim());
137   }
138
139   /**
140    * Create a {@link Namespace} with the specified name and URI.
141    *
142    * <p>
143    * Previously-encountered name/uri pairs return a cached copy.
144    *
145    * @param name The namespace name.  See {@link Namespace#getName()}.
146    * @param uri The namespace URI.  See {@link Namespace#getUri()}.
147    * @return The namespace object.
148    */
149   public static Namespace of(String name, String uri) {
150      var key = name + ":" + uri;
151      var n = CACHE.get(key);
152      if (n == null) {
153         n = new Namespace(key, name, uri);
154         var n2 = CACHE.putIfAbsent(key, n);
155         return (n2 == null ? n : n2); // HTT: n2 != null branch requires concurrent first-load race
156      }
157      return n;
158   }
159
160   final String key;
161   final String name;
162   final String uri;
163
164   /**
165    * Constructor.
166    *
167    * @param name The short name of this schema.
168    * @param uri The URI of this schema.
169    */
170   private Namespace(String key, String name, String uri) {
171      this.key = key;
172      this.name = name;
173      this.uri = uri;
174   }
175
176   /**
177    * Returns the namespace name.
178    *
179    * @return The namespace name.
180    */
181   public String getName() { return name; }
182
183   /**
184    * Returns the namespace URI.
185    *
186    * @return The namespace URI.
187    */
188   public String getUri() { return uri; }
189
190   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
191   public String toString() {
192      return key;
193   }
194}
